name: Rio Silver Inc.
description: Rio Silver Inc. (TSX-V: RYO) is a Canadian silver exploration and development company focused on advancing high-grade silver projects in Peru. The company aims to build a pure-play silver development platform by identifying high-grade mineral systems in proven mining districts. With a strategy centered on disciplined capital execution and leveraging existing infrastructure, Rio Silver seeks to shorten development timelines and enhance shareholder value. The company’s flagship assets include the Maria Norte and Santa Rita projects, which demonstrate significant potential for silver production alongside lead, zinc, and gold credits.
